titleStmt.title: SII 9.367: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 367. (A.R. No. 520 of 1915.) ON A SLAB LYING NEAR THE TANK-BUND AT CHINNA-TUMBALAM, ADONI TALUK, BELLARY DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is damaged and dated Śaka 1[15]1, Virōdhi, Chaitra, śu. 10, Budhavāra. “In A.D. 1229, Chaitra (lunar) su. 10 fell on Tuesday. But in the solar month of Chittirai or Mēsha, śu. 10 commenced on Wednesday, 4th April = (11 Mesha) at ·06 and ended at ·04 on the following day. The month of Chaitra in the inscription may perhaps have been meant for the solar month Chittirai or Mēsha”. The record mentions Murāri Kēśava, the minister of the Yādava king Jaitugi as the lord of the dēśa (probably the Sindhuvāḍi-vishaya). It records that Anantapriya, disciple of Ananta, who was a disciple of Jñānapriya, set up the god Yōga-Narasiṁhadēva to the north of the tank (made by ?) Joyya and situated to the west of the village Tuṁbuḷa, which was at a distance of a yōjana from the river Tuṅgabhadrā and which was located in the Sindhuvāḍī-vishaya. The Mahājanas of the village are stated to have made a gift of some plots of land for the service of the god mentioned. It also registers other grants of land and tolls made for the service of the same god.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrījayābhyudayaśca . sa jayati mahāvarāhō yaddaṁṣṭrāśikharavidhrutabhūmi
yāpratitarjjitabālēṁdōḥ śṛṁgārā hariṇasya jayaṁti gṛhamāditya
pāṭaḷāḥ Udayāruṇamārtaṁḍa sakhā nakhāḥ . svasti śakavarṣada
1151 neya virōdhisaṁvatsarada caitra suddha 10 budhavāradaṁdu
svasti śrīmannṛsiṁhōditasutapiśitāsṛgrasāsvādatṛptaḥ prahrādādipra
saṁnaḥ suramunivinutō joyyanāmnastaṭākē . siddhakṣētrē pavitrē tribhuvanatiḷa
kē tuṁbuḷagrāmapārśvē tasthau yōgaṁdharōyaṁ śaraṇagatamidaṁ pātu śaśvatsa vi
śvaṁ . śrīmatkuṁtaḷasiṁdhuvāḍiviṣayē śrītuṁgabhadrānadī tasyā dakṣiṇatastu yō
janamitaḥ śrītuṁbuḷagrāmakaḥ . tasmātpaścimatastu joyyakṛtakakhyātaṁ taṭā
kaṁ mahattasmāduttarataḥsthitō narahariryyōgandharō rājatē . dṛpyaddaityatama
stōmataraṇiḥ śaraṇaṁ mama . smaraṇādduritadhvaṁsī śrīnṛsiṁhasudarśanaṁ .
Ādau jñānapriyākhyō gururadhikaguṇō yōgamārgēśvarōsau tacchiṣyōnantanā
māpyagaṇitamahimānantanāmnōpi tasya . śiṣyōnantapriyākhyaḥ svaguruparipa
ṇastatphalaṁ brahma labdhuṁ siddhakṣētrē pratiṣṭhāmanayadabhinavaṁ yōgamū
rttyā nṛsiṁhaṁ . namastasmai nṛsiṁhāya duritadhvāntabhānavē . yatsmai
tērbhītayō bhītā vidravanti diśō daśa . bhāti dakṣiṇadaṁṣṭrāgraṁ vārā
haṁ dhṛtabhūtaḷaṁ . nīlābhraśakaḷākrāntarajatādririva sthitaṁ śrīmadyādavavā
rddhivarddhanavidhuḥ śrījaitugikṣmāpatiḥ tasyāmātyavarō murāriramunā
dēśādhipaḥ kēśavaḥ . klēśaṁ hantijanasya susthamakhiḷaṁ jātaṁ jagattadbalā
tkurmmō dharmmamiti sma kātaradhiyā sarvvē janāḥ kurvatē . śrautasmārttasva
karttavyahōmadhūmadhvajā dvijāḥ bhrājantē tuṁbuḷagrāmasūrayaḥ kalmaṣā
rayaḥ . svasti samastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmadagrahāraṁ haḻeyatuṁbuḷadaśēṣa
mahājanaṁgaḷu keṟeya keḻagaṇa śrīyōgamūrttinarasiṁhadēvargge pratiṣṭhākāla
śrilakṣmīnārāyaṇadēvare tōṁṭadiṁ paḍuvalu koṭṭa gadde kaṁba 50 mattaṁ kōḍi
nāyakana hiṁdi Ēriyagaṭṭina naḍuve koṭṭa gadde kaṁbaṁ 70 mattaṁ kōḍiyi
varu koṁbegalliṁ teṁkalu kisunela mattaru 1 mattaṁ tuṁbuḻapraviṣṭa
yalli keṟeya keḷagaṇa dharmmētada bhāviyiṁ teṁkaluṁ baḍagaluṁ pudige
mattaṁ tuṁbuḷapraviṣṭaṁ tuṟuhaṁpeyalli baḍagaṇa beṁceyiṁ baḍagalu Ere
dēvariṁdāgnēyada Ēriya keḻage mūḍalu kāvaṇabhaṭṭara daśakada gadde mēre
dēvara muṁdde vṛṁdāvanada tōṁṭa 1 dēvariṁ vāyavyadalu gaṭṭino
tōṁṭa 1 Intinituvaṁ dēvara Aṁgaraṁgabhōgakkaṁ khaṇḍasphuṭitajī
naṁdādīvigegaṁ Ācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluvaṁtāgi Āma
ṭṭaru . māḷapaheggaḍeya nivēśanadiṁ teṁkalu Ūrumadhyakada Ā
gaḷa kayyalu jñānapriyabhaṭṭārakara śiṣyarappa Anantasvāmigaḷa
ṇasvāmigaḷu krayavāgi koṁḍu śrīnarasiṁhadēva
du nakharaṁgaḷu kūḍi koṭṭa dharmma sarbbadhānyadalu
Arevāna koṭṭalli Arevāna hēṟinalu Ele
mūralu Uriya beṁceyiṁ paḍuvalu
taṁma holadoḻage śrīnarasiṁhadēvargge hā
ru 4 kaṁma keṟeya keḻage mūḍaṇa tuṁbi
nye(ya)ruttyadalu moladakalla holamēre
sara maga lakumarasaruṁ maṇatanūra la
teṁkalu kaṟigalliṁ molu Ereho
vasuṁdharāṁ . śaṣṭirvvarṣasaha
Digital edition of SII 9.367 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
